title: Tandem Config
description: Project-level configuration for tandem. Stored at .tandem/config.json in the consumer's ticket store repo or workspace root. Created by tandem init.

ticket_prefix.description: Uppercase project prefix for ticket IDs. Set once during tandem init. Example: 'PROJ', 'APP', 'MYCO'. All ticket IDs will be PREFIX-N.

be_repo.description: Absolute or relative path to the backend repo root. Example: '../my-api' or '/home/user/projects/api'.

fe_repo.description: Absolute or relative path to the frontend repo root. Example: '../my-frontend' or '/home/user/projects/web'.

tickets_dir.description: Absolute or relative path to the directory containing all ticket subdirectories. Each subdirectory is named by ticket ID. Example: './tickets' or '/home/user/projects/tandem-tickets'.

loop.description: If true, tandem run keeps processing tickets until the queue is empty or it is stopped. If false, tandem run processes one ticket and exits. Default: false (safe default for first runs).

loop_until.description: Optional. If set, the loop stops after completing this ticket ID, even if more tickets are queued. Useful for processing up to a known milestone.

max_retries.description: Number of times to retry a failed agent run before setting the ticket to error state. 0 means fail immediately on first error. Default: 2.

pause_on_error.description: If true, the loop pauses (does not exit) when a ticket reaches error state after max_retries. Resume with tandem resume. If false, the loop skips the errored ticket and continues. Default: true.

branch_prefix.description: Git branch name prefix for agent branches. Branches are named: {branch_prefix}{ticket_id}-be and {branch_prefix}{ticket_id}-fe. Example: 'tandem/' produces 'tandem/PROJ-42-be'. Default: 'tandem/'.

open_prs.description: If true, tandem automatically opens a pull request in each repo when both agents complete a ticket. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env variable. Default: false.

pr_base_branch.description: The base branch for pull requests. Default: 'main'.

claude_model.description: The Claude model to use for agent runs. Passed to the claude CLI via --model flag. Default: claude-sonnet-4-20250514. Use a more capable model (opus) for complex tickets.

agent_timeout_minutes.description: Maximum time in minutes to wait for a single agent run to complete. If exceeded, the run is treated as an error and retried. Default: 30.

contract_timeout_minutes.description: Maximum time in minutes to wait for contract.json to appear after the backend agent starts. Must be greater than agent_timeout_minutes in practice. Default: 35.

notify_webhook.description: Optional URL to POST status events to. Payload: { ticket_id, status, repo, branch, pr_url? }. Works with Slack incoming webhooks, Discord webhooks, or any HTTP endpoint.

git_user_name.description: Git commit author name for commits made by tandem agents. Default: 'tandem-bot'.

git_user_email.description: Git commit author email for commits made by tandem agents.
